series_metadata.series_description: Series includes supporting documentation for final determination of inspection results. Proof of meeting standards under OAC 4761:1-9.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing inspection, unless inspections results lead issuance of an Opportunity Hearing under ORC 119. ; Electronic: six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing inspection, unless inspections results lead issuance of an Opportunity Hearing under ORC 119
